name: Ranger
description: Every 5 meters you are from the target grants +2% weapon damage. Maximum +40% at 100 meters.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Ranger
perfectVersion.description: Every 4 meters you are from the target grants +2% weapon damage.

name: Close & Personal
description: Killing a target within 7 meters grants +50% weapon damage for 5 seconds.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Close & Personal
perfectVersion.description: Killing a target within 7 meters grants +65% weapon damage for 5 seconds.

name: Strained
description: Gain +10% critical hit damage for every 0.5 seconds you are continuously firing. Stacks up to 5 times for a maximum of +50% critical hit damage.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Strained
perfectVersion.description: Gain +10% critical hit damage for every 0.5 seconds you are continuously firing. Stacks up to 8 times for a maximum of +80% critical hit damage.

name: Measured
description: The top half of the magazine has +15% rate of fire and -20% weapon damage. The bottom half of the magazine has -25% rate of fire and +20% weapon damage.

name: Flatline
description: Amplifies weapon damage by 15% to pulsed enemies. After 3 kills, applies pulse to the next enemy you hit.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Flatline
perfectVersion.description: Amplifies weapon damage by 20% to pulsed enemies. After 2 kills, applies pulse to the next enemy you hit.

name: In Sync
description: Hitting an enemy grants +15% skill damage for 5 seconds. Using a non-shield skill or dealing skill damage to an enemy grants +15% weapon damage for 5 seconds. When both buffs are simultaneously active, both bonuses are doubled to +30% each.

perfectVersion.name: Perfectly In Sync
perfectVersion.description: Hitting an enemy grants +20% skill damage for 5 seconds. Using a non-shield skill or dealing skill damage grants +20% weapon damage for 5 seconds. Both bonuses double to +40% each when both are active simultaneously.

name: Pummel
description: Three consecutive body shot kills with a shotgun refill the magazine and grant +50% weapon damage for 7 seconds.

name: Killer
description: Killing an enemy with a critical hit grants +70% critical hit damage for 10 seconds.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Killer
perfectVersion.description: Killing an enemy with a critical hit grants +90% critical hit damage for 10 seconds.

name: Preservation
description: Killing an enemy repairs 10% of your armor over 5 seconds. Headshot kills increase this to 20%.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Preservation
perfectVersion.description: Killing an enemy repairs 12% of your armor over 5 seconds. Headshot kills increase this to 24%.

name: Reformation
description: Headshot kills increase skill repair and healing applied to you by 30% for 25 seconds.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Reformation
perfectVersion.description: Headshot kills increase skill repair and healing applied to you by 40% for 25 seconds.

name: Boomerang
description: Critical hits have a 50% chance to return the bullet to the magazine. The returned bullet deals +20% increased damage.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Boomerang
perfectVersion.description: Critical hits have a 50% chance to return the bullet to the magazine. The returned bullet deals +50% increased damage.

name: Breadbasket
description: Landing body shots adds a stack of +5% bonus headshot damage to the next headshot for 10 seconds. Maximum 10 stacks (+50% bonus headshot damage).

name: Fast Hands
description: Critical hits add a 3% reload speed stack for 5 seconds. Maximum 20 stacks (+60% total reload speed).

name: Frenzy
description: Reloading from an empty magazine grants +20% weapon damage and +35% rate of fire for 7 seconds.

name: First Blood
description: Requires 8x or higher scope. The first bullet fired from a full magazine deals headshot damage regardless of where it hits.

name: Optimist
description: Weapon damage is increased by +3% for every 10% of the magazine that is missing. Maximum +30% at an empty magazine.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Optimist
perfectVersion.description: Weapon damage is increased by +4% for every 10% of the magazine that is missing. Maximum +40% at an empty magazine.

name: Spike
description: Headshot kills grant +25% skill damage for 10 seconds.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Spike
perfectVersion.description: Headshot kills grant +30% skill damage for 10 seconds.

name: Vindictive
description: Killing an enemy with a status effect applied to them grants +20% critical hit chance to you and allies within 15 meters for 10 seconds.

name: Sadist
description: Bleeding enemies take +20% weapon damage from this weapon. Hits also have a chance to apply bleed.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Sadist
perfectVersion.description: Bleeding enemies take +25% weapon damage from this weapon. Hits have an increased chance to apply bleed.

name: Ignited
description: Burning enemies take +20% weapon damage from this weapon. Hits also have a chance to apply burn.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Ignited
perfectVersion.description: Burning enemies take +25% weapon damage from this weapon. Hits have an increased chance to apply burn.

name: Eyeless
description: Blinded enemies take +20% weapon damage from this weapon. Hits also have a chance to apply blind.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Eyeless
perfectVersion.description: Blinded enemies take +25% weapon damage from this weapon. Hits have an increased chance to apply blind.

name: Perpetuation
description: Headshot kills grant the next skill you use +5% duration, ammo, and charges. Stacks up to 10 times. Cooldown: 15 seconds.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Perpetuation
perfectVersion.description: Headshot kills grant the next skill you use +5% duration, ammo, and charges. Stacks up to 10 times. Cooldown: 10 seconds.

name: Rifleman
description: Headshots grant a stack of +10% weapon damage for 5 seconds. Maximum 5 stacks (+50% weapon damage).

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Rifleman
perfectVersion.description: Headshots grant a stack of +12% weapon damage for 5 seconds. Maximum 5 stacks (+60% weapon damage).

name: Steady Handed
description: Landing shots adds a stack of +2% weapon handling. At 15 stacks (+30% handling), the next shot has a 5% chance to refill the magazine.

name: On Empty
description: Reloading from an empty magazine grants +30% weapon handling for 10 seconds.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect On Empty
perfectVersion.description: Reloading from an empty magazine grants +40% weapon handling for 10 seconds.

name: Overflowing
description: Every empty magazine reload adds one round to the next magazine. Maximum magazine size increases are uncapped.

name: Near Sighted
description: Weapon stability is increased by +80%. Critical hit chance range and optimal range are decreased by 20%.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Near Sighted
perfectVersion.description: Weapon stability is increased by +100%. Critical hit chance range and optimal range are decreased by 20%.

name: Outsider
description: As you fire, weapon accuracy and range decrease while rate of fire increases. Kills reset these changes.

name: Overwhelming
description: Suppressed enemies take +10% weapon damage per stack. Stacks up to 4 times. Applying suppression adds a stack.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Overwhelming
perfectVersion.description: Suppressed enemies take +12% weapon damage per stack. Stacks up to 4 times.

name: Unhinged
description: Grants +25% weapon damage at the cost of -35% weapon handling.

name: Unwavering
description: Swapping to this weapon grants maximum weapon handling for 5 seconds. Kills while active refresh the duration.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Unwavering
perfectVersion.description: Swapping to this weapon grants maximum weapon handling for 5 seconds, with increased handling values.

name: Finisher
description: Swapping to this weapon within 3 seconds of a kill grants +30% critical hit chance for 15 seconds. Kills with this weapon while active grant an additional +30% critical hit damage.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Finisher
perfectVersion.description: Swapping to this weapon within 3 seconds of a kill grants +40% critical hit chance for 15 seconds. Kills with this weapon while active grant an additional +50% critical hit damage.

name: Salvage
description: Kills with this weapon have a 70% chance to refill the magazine from reserves.

perfectVersion.name: Perfect Salvage
perfectVersion.description: Kills with this weapon have an 85% chance to refill the magazine from reserves.

name: Future Perfect
description: Weapon kills grant +1 skill tier until you reach tier 6, at which point they trigger Skill Overcharge for 15 seconds. Cooldown: 30 seconds for the overcharge.

name: Lucky Shot
description: Magazine capacity is increased by 20%. Shots fired from cover have a 25% chance to return to the magazine on a miss.

name: Naked
description: Requires 8x scope or higher. While your armor is fully depleted, gain +50% headshot damage.

name: Premeditated
description: Manually loading shells grants +10% weapon damage per shell loaded, up to +35%. If you load a full magazine, gain an additional +50% weapon damage for 10 seconds.

name: Allegro
description: +10% rate of fire.

name: Extra
description: +20% magazine capacity.

name: Stable
description: +15% stability.

name: Distance
description: +15% optimal range.

name: Accurate
description: +15% accuracy.

name: Jazz Hands
description: +10% reload speed.

name: Optimized
description: +15% weapon handling.

name: In Rhythm
description: Enemy kills have a 5% chance to refresh active skill cooldowns. Holstered talent. Cooldown: 60 seconds.

name: Stop, Drop, and Roll
description: Rolling removes the burn, bleed, and poisoned status effects. Holstered talent. Cooldown: 60 seconds.

name: Rooted
description: While in cover, skill damage and healing are increased by +25% for 10 seconds. Holstered talent. Cooldown: 25 seconds.

name: Protected Deploy
description: +10% bonus armor while deploying a skill. Holstered talent.

name: Protected Reload
description: +10% bonus armor while reloading. Holstered talent.

name: Recharged
description: Skills deployed while at full armor have +25% additional duration, charges, and ammo. Holstered talent.

name: Wascally
description: While holstered, resist 5 ensnare attempts before this talent is consumed. Holstered talent. Cooldown: 60 seconds.

name: Everlasting
description: While holstered and in cover, the weapon regenerates 2 ammo every 5 seconds. Holstered talent.

name: Overlap
description: While holstered, the equipped weapon gains a weapon-type-specific handling bonus. Holstered talent.

name: Transmission
description: While holstered, if you are shocked, the shock is transferred to the nearest enemy within 10 meters. Holstered talent. Cooldown: 60 seconds.

name: Greased
description: While holstered, weapon swap speed is increased by 10%. Holstered talent.

name: Double Duty
description: While holstered, reloading from an empty magazine grants 20% of the magazine as bonus free ammo once every 30 seconds. Holstered talent.

name: Zen
description: While equipped and in cover for 3 seconds, removes the blind and disorient status effects from you.

name: Determined
description: Headshot kills have a chance to guarantee the next shot is a critical hit.

name: Pumped Up
description: Reloading grants +1% weapon damage for 10 seconds.

name: Sport Mode
description: While this weapon is unholstered, movement speed is increased by 20%. Does not stack with other movement speed bonuses.
